subcodes.title: Words to May Maxwell et al, spoken on 1898-02-22
subcodes.first_line: We can all serve in the Cause of God no matter what our occupation is. No occupation can prevent the soul coming to God. Peter was a fisherman
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @work as worship, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @service to others; to the Cause of God
